call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently filled out a form online regarding a Personal Loan. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  That's right, 8.99%.  Now, what were you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: Just some home improvements, you know, a new bathroom. 
Agent: Excellent! A bathroom remodel, fantastic.  And are you currently carrying any other debts? Just to get a full picture. 
Eleanor: A little student loan debt, but it's manageable. 
Agent: Okay, that's good.  So, with this $10,000 Personal Loan, your monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months.  Does that sound feasible? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that sounds okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150.  It's, uh, pretty standard.  But the rate, 8.99%, is very competitive. 
Eleanor: Okay.  And there's no penalty for paying it off early? 
Agent: Absolutely not!  You can pay it off whenever you like, no penalties whatsoever.  So, are you ready to move forward with the application?  It's quick and easy, we can do it right now. 
Eleanor: Yeah, okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we acquired your information through a marketing partner. We're pre-approving you for a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and a lower APR after the introductory period. 
Robert: No thank you. I'm not interested. And please, take my number off your list. 
Agent: Okay, sir. Have a good day.

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan.  I understand you were referred by our partner, GreenTech Solutions? 
Jessica: Yeah, that's right. They said you guys might be able to help me with some funding for my business. 
Agent: Absolutely! We specialize in loans for entrepreneurs. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%.  What kind of business are you running? 
Jessica: I'm a freelance graphic designer. I need the money to upgrade my equipment. 
Agent: That's fantastic!  So, with this $15,000 loan, your monthly payments would be around $330 for 48 months.  We can also discuss different repayment options. 
Jessica: Okay, that sounds… manageable. What's the catch? 
Agent: No catch! Just a standard credit check and proof of income.  There's a small application fee of $75.  But the 12.5% rate is very competitive for a small business loan. 
Jessica: Hmm.  I need to think about it. Can you send me some information via email? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms and conditions.  My email is david.securefinance@email.com.  Would you like me to follow up with you tomorrow?

Agent: Good afternoon, Mr. Davis. This is Lisa from Premier Financial. I see you expressed interest in our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Yeah, I was just looking at the rewards program. 
Agent: Excellent! We are pre-approving you for a $5000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 14.99%. It offers 2% cashback on all purchases and travel insurance. 
Michael: 14.99%? That seems a little high. 
Agent: It's competitive for a rewards card, sir. And you can transfer an existing balance to lower your overall interest payments. 
Michael: I might consider that. What are the fees? 
Agent: There's an annual fee of $99, but that's waived for the first year. There's also a late payment fee of $35. 
Michael: $99 a year? That's… a lot. 
Agent: It covers the extensive rewards program and benefits, sir. We also offer a credit line increase after six months of responsible use. 
Michael: Hmm. What if I just want to use it for everyday purchases? 
Agent: You'll still earn 2% cashback on everything, sir. And you'll build your credit score. 
Michael: Okay. Look, I'm willing to try it, but can you waive the annual fee for a second year? 
Agent: Let me see what I can do. *pause* Okay, sir, I can offer you a waiver for the second year as a special promotion. 
Michael: Alright, that sounds good. Let's proceed with the application.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin from Universal Lending. We're offering a Personal Loan to qualified applicants. 
Patricia: You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, we are pre-approving you for a $3000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%. 
Patricia: 24.99?! Are you kidding me?! This is ridiculous! I want my number removed from your list *immediately*! 
Agent: I understand your frustration, ma'am. 
Patricia: No, you *don't* understand! *click*
